Title: User Registration
Test Steps:
1. Open the Barattopoly app
2. Tap on the "Register" button
3. Enter the required user data
4. Tap on the "Register" button
Expected Result: User is successfully registered and can log in

Title: User Login
Test Steps:
1. Open the Barattopoly app
2. Tap on the "Login" button
3. Enter the user credentials
4. Tap on the "Login" button
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in

Title: Manage Personal Bacheca
Test Data: Valid items to add, remove or update in the personal bacheca
Test Steps:
1. Open the Barattopoly app
2. Log in with valid credentials
3. Navigate to the personal bacheca section
4. Add, remove or update items in the personal bacheca
Expected Result: Items are successfully added, removed or updated in the personal bacheca

Title: Explore Offers
Test Steps:
1. Open the Barattopoly app
2. Log in with valid credentials
3. Navigate to the offers section
4. Browse through the available offers
Expected Result: User can browse through the available offers

Title: Propose Swap
Preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the personal bacheca
Test Steps:
1. Open the Barattopoly app
2. Log in with valid credentials
3. Navigate to the personal bacheca section
4. Select the items to swap
5. Tap on the "Propose Swap" button
Expected Result: Swap proposal is successfully created and sent to the selected user

Title: View Swap Proposals
Preconditions: User is logged in and has received swap proposals
Test Steps:
1. Open the Barattopoly app
2. Log in with valid credentials
3. Navigate to the swap proposals section
4. View the received swap proposals
Expected Result: User can view the received swap proposals

Title: Accept/Reject Swap Proposals
Preconditions: User is logged in and has received swap proposals
Test Steps:
1. Open the Barattopoly app
2. Log in with valid credentials
3. Navigate to the swap proposals section
4. Select a swap proposal
5. Tap on the "Accept" or "Reject" button
Expected Result: Swap proposal is successfully accepted or rejected

Title: Use Filters for Search
Test Steps:
1. Open the Barattopoly app
2. Log in with valid credentials
3. Navigate to the offers section
4. Apply filters for search
Expected Result: Offers matching the applied filters are displayed

Title: Modify Personal Data
Test Steps:
1. Open the Barattopoly app
2. Log in with valid credentials
3. Navigate to the personal data section
4. Modify the personal data
Expected Result: Personal data is successfully modified

Title: User Login
Preconditions: The user has a valid account
Test Steps:
1. Start the application
2. Enter the login credentials
3. The system checks the validity of the data and, if correct, grants access to the application
Expected Result: The system retrieves the user data from the database and makes it available for viewing and interaction by the user.

Title: Publishing New Items in the Personal Basket
Preconditions: The user is logged in to the application
Test Steps:
1. Click the button to create a new item
2. Fill out the form with the item details
3. The system checks the correctness of the data entered and, if correct, adds the item to the database
Expected Result: The user can see the new item in their personal basket along with other previously published items.

Title: Explore Offers
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in
Test Steps:
1. Login
2. Tap on the offers icon
Expected Result: System displays the offers from other users

Title: Propose a Trade
Preconditions:
User is registered and logged in
User is viewing another user's offer
User has at least one item to trade in their own bacheca
Test Steps:
1. Login
2. Tap on the offer to view its details
3. Tap on the trade button and select an item from the user's bacheca
Expected Result: System sends a trade request to the other user

Title: View Active Trades
Preconditions: User has at least one active trade
Test Steps: 1. Tap on the active trades icon
Expected Result: System displays the user's active trades in chronological order

Title: Accept or Reject a Trade Proposal
Preconditions: User has received a trade proposal
Test Steps:
1. Tap on the trade proposal notification
2. Tap on the accept or reject button
Expected Result: System sends a notification to the other user about the trade's status

Title: Filter Search
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in
Test Steps:
1. Login
2. Tap on the offers icon
3. Tap on the filter icon
Expected Result: System displays a menu with filters for location, item type, and purpose of the item

Title: Update Personal Data
Preconditions: User is registered and logged in
Test Steps:
1. Login
2. Tap on the profile icon
3. Update the user's personal data
4. Confirm the changes
Expected Result: System updates the user's personal data in the database

Title: User Registration Validation
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page
2. Enter valid email and available username
3. Click on the "Register" button
Expected Result: User is successfully registered and redirected to the login page

Title: User Registration Duplicate Check
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page
2. Enter existing email and available username
3. Click on the "Register" button
Expected Result: Registration is denied due to duplicate email

Title: User Registration Data Save
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page
2. Enter valid email and available username
3. Click on the "Register" button
4. Verify that the user's data is saved in the database
Expected Result: User's data is saved in the database

Title: User Login Validation
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter valid email and correct password
3. Click on the "Login" button
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard

Title: User Login Incorrect Password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter valid email and incorrect password
3. Click on the "Login" button
Expected Result: Login is denied due to incorrect password

Title: User Login Inactive Account
Preconditions: User has registered but account is inactive
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter valid email and correct password
Expected Result: Login is denied due to inactive account

Title: Add Item to Personal Bacheca
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the add item page
2. Enter valid item details
3. Click on the "Add Item" button
Expected Result: Item is added to the personal bacheca and saved in the database

Title: Item Validation Before Adding
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the add item page
2. Enter invalid item details
3. Click on the "Add Item" button
Expected Result: Item is not added to the personal bacheca due to invalid details

Title: Item Save to Database
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the add item page
2. Enter valid item details
3. Click on the "Add Item" button
4. Verify that the item is saved in the database
Expected Result: Item is saved in the database

Title: Delete Item from Personal Bacheca
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the personal bacheca page
2. Select the item to delete
3. Click on the "Delete" button
Expected Result: Item is deleted from the personal bacheca and removed from the database

Title: Cannot Delete Item in Progress of Trade
Preconditions: User is logged in and item is in progress of trade
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the personal bacheca page
2. Select the item to delete
Expected Result: Item cannot be deleted due to ongoing trade

Title: Filter Offers
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the offers page
2. Apply filter criteria
3. Verify that the displayed offers match the filter criteria
Expected Result: Offers match the applied filter criteria

Title: Offer Save to Database
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the add offer page
2. Enter valid offer details
3. Click on the "Add Offer" button
4. Verify that the offer is saved in the database
Expected Result: Offer is saved in the database

Title: Offer Validation Before Adding
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the add offer page
2. Enter invalid offer details
3. Click on the "Add Offer" button
Expected Result: Offer is not added to the database due to invalid details

Title: Cannot Delete Offer in Progress of Trade
Preconditions: User is logged in and offer is in progress of trade
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the offers page
2. Select the offer to delete
Expected Result: Offer cannot be deleted due to ongoing trade

Title: Check item availability before proposing a trade
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the item details page
2. Check if the item is available for trade
Expected Result: If the item is available, the user can propose a trade. If the item is not available, an error message is displayed.

Title: Check compatibility with Android version 8.0 or higher
Preconditions: Device with Android version 8.0 or higher
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on the device
2. Check if the application starts without any errors
Expected Result: The application starts without any errors

Title: Check cache management
Test Steps:
1. Take a picture and add it to the application
2. Close the application
3. Reopen the application
4. Check if the picture is still present
Expected Result: The picture is not present in the application

Title: Check interface usability
Test Steps:
1. Navigate through the application
2. Check if the interface is simple and intuitive
Expected Result: The interface is simple and intuitive

Title: Check Firebase Realtime database usage
Test Steps:
1. Perform an action that requires database interaction
2. Check if the database interaction is successful
Expected Result: The database interaction is successful

Title: Check internet connection requirement
Test Steps:
1. Disconnect from the internet
2. Launch the application
3. Check if the application starts without any errors
Expected Result: The application does not start with an error

Title: Check camera requirement
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Check if the camera is required to perform certain actions
Expected Result: The camera is required to perform certain actions

Title: Check storage space requirement
Test Steps:
1. Check the available storage space on the device
2. Install the application
3. Check if the installation is successful
Expected Result: The installation is successful and the device has sufficient storage space

Title: Check data privacy compliance
Test Steps:
1. Perform actions that involve personal data
2. Check if the personal data is handled in compliance with GDPR
Expected Result: The personal data is handled in compliance with GDPR

Title: Check deliverables
Test Steps:
1. Check the deliverables of the project
2. Check if they are delivered on time and meet the required standards
Expected Result: The deliverables are delivered on time and meet the required standards

Title: Check performance
Test Steps:
1. Perform actions that require processing power
2. Check if the application performs as expected
Expected Result: The application performs as expected

Title: Check security
Test Steps:
1. Perform actions that require sensitive data
2. Check if the sensitive data is handled securely
Expected Result: The sensitive data is handled securely

Title: Check reliability
Test Steps:
1. Perform actions that require network connectivity
2. Check if the application remains stable and does not crash
Expected Result: The application remains stable and does not crash

Title: Check portability
Test Steps:
1. Test the application on different devices
2. Check if the application works as expected on all devices
Expected Result: The application works as expected on all devices that meet the minimum requirements

Title: User can propose multiple objects for trade
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the trade page
2. Select multiple objects to trade
3. Submit the trade request
Expected Result: The trade request is successfully submitted with the selected objects

Title: User can block other users
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user's profile
2. Click on the block button
Expected Result: The other user is blocked and can no longer interact with the current user

Title: Cloud messaging between users
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the messaging page
2. Send a message to another user
3. Verify that the message is received by the other user
Expected Result: The message is successfully sent and received by both users

Title: Geographical filters based on coordinates
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the search page
2. Set the geographical filter
3. Search for items
Expected Result: The search results are limited to items within the specified coordinates or range

Title: Saving favorite offers
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the offer page
2. Save the offer as a favorite
Expected Result: The offer is successfully saved as a favorite and can be accessed later

Title: Multi-language support
Test Steps:
1. Change the language setting
2. Verify that the application interface is displayed in the selected language
Expected Result: The application interface is displayed in the selected language

Title: Review system
Preconditions: User has traded with another user
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the review page
2. Submit a review and rating for the other user
Expected Result: The review and rating are successfully submitted and visible to other users

Title: Validate data form for publication in personal inventory
Preconditions: User has an account and has filled the form
Test Data: Data for a new item to be published
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the form for publishing a new item
2. User enters the required data for the new item
3. User submits the form
Expected Result: System validates the entered data and displays a success message if the data is valid, or an error message if the data is invalid

Title: Publish item in personal inventory
Preconditions: User has a validated form for a new item
Test Data: Validated data for a new item
Test Steps:
1. System saves the validated data for the new item
2. System adds the new item to the user's personal inventory
3. System displays a success message
Expected Result: The new item is added to the user's personal inventory and is visible to the user

Title: Delete item from personal inventory
Preconditions: User has at least one item in their personal inventory
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the item they want to delete
2. User confirms the deletion of the item
Expected Result: The item is removed from the user's personal inventory and the database

Title: Search for items in personal inventory
Preconditions: System has items in the database
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the search page
2. User enters a search term
3. System displays the search results
Expected Result: The system displays the items that match the search term

Title: Initiate a swap request
Preconditions: User is logged in and has items in another user's inventory
Test Data: Destination user and item to swap
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the other user's inventory
2. User selects an item they want to swap
3. User initiates a swap request
Expected Result: The swap request is sent to the destination user

Title: Check if items are available for swapping
Preconditions: System has items in the database and swap requests for the user
Test Data: Items in the user's inventory and swap requests for the user
Test Steps:
1. System checks if the items are available for swapping
2. System removes the items that are not available for swapping from the list of available items
Expected Result: The system only displays the items that are available for swapping

Title: View swap requests
Preconditions: System has swap requests for the user
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the swap requests page
2. System displays the swap requests
Expected Result: The system displays the swap requests that have been received by the user

Title: User can view own trade proposals
Preconditions: User is logged in and in the appropriate section of the app.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the section of the app that displays trade proposals.
2. User checks if they can see an list of all their trade proposals.
Expected Result: User sees a list of all their trade proposals.

Title: User can view status of outgoing trade proposals
Preconditions: User is logged in and in the appropriate section of the app.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the section of the app that displays trade proposals.
2. User checks if they can see the status of all their outgoing trade proposals (accepted, rejected, or cancelled).
Expected Result: User sees the status of all their outgoing trade proposals.

Title: User can view trade proposals of others
Preconditions: User is logged in and in the appropriate section of the app.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the section of the app that displays trade proposals.
2. User checks if they can see a list of all trade proposals that are not yet concluded.
Expected Result: User sees a list of all trade proposals that are not yet concluded.

Title: User can accept a trade proposal
Preconditions: User has an active trade proposal from another user.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the section of the app that displays their active trade proposals.
2. User selects a trade proposal to accept.
3. User confirms the acceptance of the trade proposal.
Expected Result: The trade proposal is accepted.

Title: User can reject a trade proposal
Preconditions: User has an active trade proposal from another user.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the section of the app that displays their active trade proposals.
2. User selects a trade proposal to reject.
3. User confirms the rejection of the trade proposal.
Expected Result: The trade proposal is rejected.

Title: User can filter trade proposals by category
Preconditions: User is logged in and in the appropriate section of the app.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the section of the app that displays trade proposals.
2. User applies filters to the list of trade proposals based on category (goods, services, location).
3. User checks if the list of trade proposals is updated based on the applied filters.
Expected Result: User sees a list of trade proposals that match the applied filters.

Title: User can modify personal data
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the section of the app that displays their personal data.
2. User modifies their personal data.
3. User confirms the modification of their personal data.
Expected Result: User's personal data is updated.

Title: Check Android version compatibility
Preconditions: The device is powered on and connected to the internet.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on the device.
2. Check the Android version of the device.
Expected Result: The device's Android version is 8.0 Oreo or higher.

Title: Check for camera presence
Preconditions: The device is powered on and connected to the internet.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on the device.
2. Check if the device has a camera.
Expected Result: The device has a camera.

Title: Check real-time data updates
Preconditions: The device is powered on and connected to the internet.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on the device.
2. Perform an action that updates the data in the database.
3. Check if the updated data is immediately visible in the application.
Expected Result: The updated data is immediately visible in the application.

Title: Check data conflict resolution
Preconditions: The device is powered on and connected to the internet.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on two devices.
2. Perform the same action that updates the data in the database on both devices simultaneously.
3. Check if the data conflict is resolved without data loss.
Expected Result: The data conflict is resolved without data loss.

Title: Check Android integration
Preconditions: The device is powered on and connected to the internet.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on the device.
2. Check if the application is properly integrated with the Android platform.
Expected Result: The application is properly integrated with the Android platform.

Title: Check secure, simple, and fast development
Preconditions: The device is powered on and connected to the internet.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on the device.
2. Check if the development of the database is secure, simple, and fast.
Expected Result: The development of the database is secure, simple, and fast.
